diagnoses.name: Acute kidney injury, unspecified
diagnoses.evidence_span: Acute kidney injury, unspecified — Likely multifactorial etiology including volume depletion and hyperglycemic hyperosmolar state. Creatinine elevated acutely with corresponding rise in BUN.

diagnoses.name: Hyponatremia with hypo-osmolality
diagnoses.evidence_span: Hyponatremia with hypo-osmolality — Severe hyponatremia (118 mEq/L) contributing significantly to altered mental status. Likely SIADH or euvolemic hyponatremia given clinical presentation.

diagnoses.name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with hyperglycemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Type 2 diabetes mellitus with hyperglycemia — Poorly controlled glucose at 312 mg/dL on admission; patient on insulin therapy with suboptimal glycemic control.

diagnoses.name: Hypothyroidism
diagnoses.evidence_span: Hypothyroidism — Stable; TSH within normal range on current levothyroxine dosing.

diagnoses.name: Sarcoidosis
diagnoses.evidence_span: Sarcoidosis — Chronic condition, appears stable without acute pulmonary decompensation.

diagnoses.name: Hypercholesterolemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Hypercholesterolemia — Noted on recent lab work; not acutely contributing to current presentation.

diagnoses.name: Epilepsy, unspecified, not intractable
diagnoses.evidence_span: Epilepsy, unspecified, not intractable — No seizure activity documented during admission; patient remained seizure-free.

procedures.name: IV hydration
procedures.evidence_span: During hospitalization, the patient received aggressive IV hydration with careful sodium repletion to address both the acute kidney injury and severe hyponatremia.

procedures.name: Serial sodium monitoring
procedures.evidence_span: Sodium levels were monitored serially to avoid overcorrection.

procedures.name: Chest X-ray
procedures.evidence_span: Chest X-ray showed subtle bilateral interstitial opacities consistent with known sarcoidosis, stable from prior studies.

medications.name: Insulin
medications.evidence_span: the patient has a significant past medical history including type 2 diabetes mellitus for which he has been on insulin therapy

medications.name: Antiepileptic medications
medications.evidence_span: epilepsy which has been controlled on current antiepileptic regimen

chief_complaint: Acute onset of altered mental status and fatigue
